mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_facility_equipment WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '만료' THEN 0 WHEN '임박' THEN 1 WHEN '정상' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, next_inspect_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_facility_equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_equipment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_equipment WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_equipment WHERE deleted = 0 AND next_inspect_date IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE), next_inspect_date) BETWEEN 0 AND #{days}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_facility_equipment ( mgmt_no, name, category, spec, location, install_date, base_law, inspect_type, inspect_period, last_inspect_date, next_inspect_date, status, owner_user_id, owner_name, owner_dept, maker, maker_no, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{mgmtNo}, #{name}, #{category}, #{spec}, #{location}, #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{baseLaw}, #{inspectType}, #{inspectPeriod}, #{lastInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'정상', #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerName}, #{ownerDept}, #{maker}, #{makerNo}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_facility_equipment SET mgmt_no = #{mgmtNo}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, spec = #{spec}, location = #{location}, install_date = #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, base_law = #{baseLaw}, inspect_type = #{inspectType}, inspect_period = #{inspectPeriod}, last_inspect_date = #{lastInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_inspect_date = #{nextInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, owner_dept = #{ownerDept}, maker = #{maker}, maker_no = #{makerNo}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_facility_equipment SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
